login.title: Connect your FreeCustom.Email account
login.desc:
Click the button below to open the login page.
This link expires in **3 minutes**.

After logging in, return here — the bot updates automatically.

logout.success: ✓ Logged out. Your credentials have been removed.
logout.not_logged_in: You're not logged in. Nothing to remove.

inbox.none:
No inboxes registered yet.
Use `/inbox add` or `/quickstart` to create one.

messages.title: Messages in {inbox}
messages.none:
No messages yet.
Emails sent to this address will appear here.

otp.title: OTP
otp.subject: Subject
otp.none: No OTP found in recent messages.

domains.title: Available Domains
domains.none: No domains available on your plan.

watch.list_none: No active watches. Use `/watch <inbox>` to start.
watch.email_fallback: ⚠ Couldn't post to {channel}. Here it is instead:

plans.title: API Plans
plans.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your usage.

feedback.prompt_desc: You've been using the FCE bot a while — mind leaving a 5-second rating? It really helps.
feedback.stars_label: How would you rate the bot?
feedback.comment_placeholder: Works great! / Could use X feature...
feedback.thanks: ✓ Thanks! Your feedback means a lot.
feedback.skipped: No worries — you won't be asked again.

support.sent: ✓ Support ticket submitted. We'll reply to your Discord DM.
support.failed: ✗ Couldn't submit — try emailing support@freecustom.email directly.

errors.not_logged_in:
✗ Not logged in.
Run `/login` to connect your account.
errors.plan_gate:
⚡ **{plan} plan required**
{feature} is available on {plan} and above.

→ See plans
errors.unknown: ✗ Something went wrong. Try again or run `/support`.

quickstart.title: ✓ Inbox ready
quickstart.hint: Send an email to this address and it will appear here instantly.
quickstart.no_ws:
Real-time watch needs Startup plan.
Emails are still accessible via `/messages {inbox}`.

guide.step3_desc: Get notified instantly when emails arrive.
guide.step4_desc: One-time codes are detected and shown automatically.
guide.done_desc: Run `/help` anytime to see all commands.

help.title: FreeCustom.Email Bot
help.subtitle: Disposable inboxes, OTP extraction, and real-time email — in Discord.

insights.title: Insights — {inbox}
insights.none: No issues detected. Delivery looks healthy.
